title: China and Fissile Material Cutoff Treaty
summary: In this paper, I will explore China's possible position in upcoming FMCT negotiations, China’s major security concerns, the kind of verification provisions that could be accepted by China, and the factors that might facilitate China’s participation in the treaty.
body: Presented at the 43rd Annual Meeting of the Institute for Nuclear Materials Management The latest from Belfer See more In this paper, I will explore China's possible position in upcoming FMCT negotiations, China’s major security concerns, the kind of verification provisions that could be accepted by China, and the factors that might facilitate China’s participation in the treaty.
